final:
module top_module(
    
    input [15:0] extendee,
    input ExtSel,
    
    output reg[31:0] result
    );integer i;
    
    

    always @(ExtSel or extendee) begin
            for(i = 0; i < 16; i = i + 1) begin
                result[i] <= extendee[i];
            end 
            
            if(ExtSel) begin
                for(i = 16; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin
                    result[i] = extendee[15];
                end 
            end else begin 
                for(i = 16; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin
                    result[i] = 0;
                end
            end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result[31] <= ~ExtSel; result[30] <= ~ExtSel; result[29] <= ~ExtSel; result[28] <= ~ExtSel;
    end
  end

endmodule
